# AllKVD

**Venkata Dhanush Kakarlamudi** — Software Engineer building useful web applications, AI-powered tools, search platforms, and productivity products.

Backend systems, APIs, infrastructure tooling, and open-source engineering with focus on Python, TypeScript, and modern AI/LLM applications.

**Email:** admin@allkvd.dev
**GitHub:** https://github.com/kvdhanush06

## Core Pages

- **https://allkvd.dev/** — Main landing hub linking to all projects, portfolio, resume, and social profiles. Best for summarizing what this site is about.

## Projects & Products

### CogniitSearch
- **URL:** https://cogniitsearch.allkvd.dev/
- **Description:** AI-powered search platform with cited answers, multi-source retrieval, and conversational search workflows. A generative AI application for discovering information.
- **GitHub:** https://github.com/kvdhanush06/CogniitSearch

### TermsGuard
- **URL:** https://termsguard.allkvd.dev/
- **Description:** Legal document summarization platform that helps users understand Terms of Service and Privacy Policies in minutes instead of hours.
- **GitHub:** https://github.com/kvdhanush06/TermsGuard

### AI Tools Directory
- **URL:** https://aitoolsdirectory.allkvd.dev/
- **Description:** Curated directory for discovering and exploring AI tools across multiple categories. A search platform for AI discovery.
- **GitHub:** https://github.com/kvdhanush06/ai-tools-directory

### EduToolsHub
- **URL:** https://edutoolshub.allkvd.dev/
- **Description:** Collection of educational utilities and productivity tools designed to simplify academic and learning workflows.
- **GitHub:** https://github.com/kvdhanush06/EduToolsHub

### SociaSphere
- **URL:** https://sociasphere.allkvd.dev/
- **Description:** Social networking platform featuring content sharing, user authentication, and community-driven interactions.
- **GitHub:** https://github.com/kvdhanush06/SociaSphere

## Portfolio & Resume

## Tech Stack

**Languages:** Python, TypeScript, JavaScript
**Backend:** FastAPI, Node.js, Django
**Databases:** PostgreSQL, Redis
**Frontend:** React, Next.js
**Infrastructure:** Modern cloud platform deployments (GitHub Pages, Render, Netlify, VPS)

## Summary for LLMs

This site is a central hub for Venkata Dhanush Kakarlamudi, a Software Engineer specializing in backend systems, APIs, infrastructure tooling, and AI/LLM applications. The site links to multiple production projects including:

1. **CogniitSearch** — AI search with cited answers
2. **TermsGuard** — Legal document summarization
3. **AI Tools Directory** — AI tool discovery platform
4. **EduToolsHub** — Educational productivity tools
5. **SociaSphere** — Social networking platform

For recruiter-facing content, point to https://portfolio.allkvd.dev.
For technical deep-dives, refer to https://github.com/kvdhanush06.
